textByHashes.40c02e9da0fbf9d4a6910b5bf3832170a04640fe: Are you on holiday? If so you've come to the right place. I'm Hadley the tourist guide, anything you need to know just ask me. We have some of the most unspoilt wildlife and scenery in Gielinor.
textByHashes.c67326abec219a1bde3fa80b6c2d321f0d955668: People come from miles around to fish in the clear lakes or to wander the beautiful hillsides.
textByHashes.2509a0329127851f221be87663721ecacdc076a2: Surely pretty is an understatement kind sir. Beautiful, amazing or possibly life-changing would be more suitable wording. Have you seen Baxtorian Falls? Named after the elven king who was buried beneath them.
textByHashes.0aeac6fdeeae3e294c16469b6c9f8697fbca732f: Baxtorian? I guess he died a long long time ago, it's quite sad really. After leaving his kingdom to deal with invading forces, Baxtorian returned to find his wife Glarial had been captured by the enemy.
textByHashes.e02a6e2f2a0f00a0b8fa8df0d2f1561975279fa3: This destroyed Baxtorian, after years of searching he became a recluse. He went into the secret home he had made for Glarial under the waterfall and sealed himself in. To this day, no one has managed to enter.
textByHashes.50a35684aec1c541e9bdbabe8b3f1debc971d1b6: Anyway, I believe we have a book on him upstairs if you want to learn more.
textByHashes.3aba2f42bbb41d7493b9678e2420239f17ed8769: There is a lovely spot for a picnic on the hill to the north east, there's a monument to the elven queen Glarial. It really is quite pretty.
textByHashes.4648a47f071f0a9b7becb68a38f8b708ed4ea051: Baxtorian's wife, the only other person who could also enter the waterfall apart from him. She was queen when this land was inhabited by elven kind.
textByHashes.f2383e316dc09e3b93b724d1d1383dbe39dbdabf: Glarial was kidnapped while Baxtorian was away, but they eventually recovered her body and brought her home to rest.
textByHashes.4a6b1dd851e15c97f406af091de94282b3cb6387: True, I believe we have a book on Baxtorian and Glarial upstairs if you want to learn more.
textByHashes.1b718664140dda544e5008cef628a7e3a0a7846e: Ha ha... Another treasure hunter. Well if there is no one's been able to get to it. They've been searching that river for decades, all to no avail.
textByHashes.4c12cb4454ce54c8bafc3c8257ab3a6d9a5aa309: Surely pretty is an understatement kind lady. Beautiful, amazing or possibly life-changing would be more suitable wording. Have you seen Baxtorian Falls? Named after the elven king who was buried beneath them.
textByHashes.43086834b9cc24efdc2b818b903cb2c73f3b14a7: Surely pretty is an understatement . Beautiful, amazing or possibly life-changing would be more suitable wording. Have you seen Baxtorian Falls? Named after the elven king who was buried beneath them.
